name: 会话创建总数 Session Create Count
desc: Extreme leak — 37 create_session calls, 0 closes; session names degrade from descriptive ('gpu_main', 'gpu_train') into desperate suffixed and garbage IDs ('gpu_session_test99', 'gpu_session_13345435', 'gpu_session_6643533345435').

steps.t: Step 41: create_session 'gpu_train' (collides with prior, then step 42 falls back to 'gpu_train_new')
Step 113: create_session 'gpu_test_session' — total 37 sessions, none closed
